description: Product Description FSIMILING has its own factory with over 10 years professional experience about Hair Accessories. Each item is handmade artwork！ FSMILING Commits Herself To Coloring Your Life With Love FSMILING Claw Hair Clips Cutout Rectangle Tortoise No-Slip Grip Jaw Clips Create a simple, yet elegant updo anytime with the FSMILING Cutout Rectangle Hair jaw clips ,this Classic and chic hair jaw holds hair securely in a comfortable twist, making it the perfect accessory for work or play. Constructed from luxurious cellulose acetate, it features a modern cutout curved design and a covered spring. Available in a variety of colors, this jaw clip delivers effortless style and complements any ensemble. Reliable and comfortable for a gently secure grips it can hold all hair types securely and comfortably tightly without tugging pulling or damage.
